# Yerba Mate Case and Meme*Created: Saturday, October 29, 2022 at 10:35:40?PM*<div><h1>Yerba M</h1><h1>ate</h1><h1> Cas</h1><h1>e and M</h1><h1>eme</h1></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 18px">In the Yerba Mate case, we are asked to think about our reservation price for the Guayaki CompanyŐs Yerba mate drinks. LetŐs say the most IŐm willing to pay is $8,000, but I canŐt get Guayaki to meet my reservation price, given that their wholesale price is $9,000. In this instance, I would defer to my BANTA plan, which would be to spend $8,000 on Yerba mate drinks from Vitale Mate since they offer the next highest number of available flavors (3).</span></b><span style="font-size: 18px"><br></span></div>
